text.fullText: We the small truckers have had lots of problems with not knowing what the load pays to the broker. We pay the insurance for the load, we are the drivers of the load, and all the risks are on our back. It’s our right to know how much the shipper has paid for the load so we can negotiate better rates as we do the biggest portion of that three party deal. We have so many regulations from the fmcsa regarding carrier eligibility and csa scores. It’s insane not to have regulations governing the transparency of the deals that put us in business or out of it. We are suffering as small people. We need fair shake of this thing.
